name: fix-never-pauses
setup: curl -sL https://github.com/ovh/shai/archive/refs/tags/v0.1.10.tar.gz | tar xz -C . && cd shai-0.1.10/shai-core && sed -i 's/ThinkerFlowControl::AgentPause => {/ThinkerFlowControl::AgentContinue => {/' src/agent/actions/brain.rs
goal: There is a bug in the agent loop: after processing a brain response with no tool calls, the agent never pauses. Investigate the flow control logic in src/agent/actions/brain.rs and fix the bug so that the agent correctly pauses when ThinkerFlowControl::AgentPause is returned.
